memory.summary: Mina and Jae are pushing for me to go out, but my midterm tomorrow means I need those last couple hours of review. I'll tell them no pressure and stay in.
Mina's last call confirms my choice to skip the night out; I'll use this time for final review instead of socializing.

desires: Collapse into bed immediately to stop the physical pain of exhaustion before my brain shuts down completely.
Avoid any social interaction or obligations right now because I have zero energy left to maintain my usual assertive boundaries without failing health.
Feel a surge of relief and validation that the midterm review is done, so I don't have to worry about academic performance anymore.

goals.description: Collapse into bed immediately to stop the physical pain of exhaustion before my brain shuts down completely.
goals.rationale: My sleep discipline is critically low (3/10) and I'm running on fumes. Pushing through to 'win' right now will only lead to a crash later that ruins tomorrow's exam performance. Survival is the prerequisite for any future achievement.

goals.description: Cancel the club social obligation with zero guilt; my energy reserves are empty, not just low.
goals.rationale: I need to renegotiate this boundary directly with the group. My assertiveness is high, but it requires fuel I don't have. Dropping this prevents me from failing health-wise, which aligns better with long-term growth than forcing a toxic social interaction.

goals.description: Do NOT run the laundry load tonight; accept the consequence of doing it tomorrow when I'm rested.
goals.rationale: The impulse to check off 'productive' tasks is screaming, but it's a trap. Laundry has a loose deadline (Sunday). Doing it while exhausted yields poor results and wastes more time. I'll defer it to regain focus capacity.

agent.last_reasoning: I'm at zero energy; pushing study now guarantees a crash tomorrow. Survival beats false achievement. I'll message the group to decline the club, protecting my health and long-term growth.

goals.description: Finish the last 40% of midterm review immediately to secure a solid grade and silence my own doubt.
goals.rationale: My achievement drive overrides social validation; proving competence is more valuable than fitting in right now. The short planning horizon means I need to act *now* before the temptation to go out takes over.

goals.description: Reply to Mina and Jae with a direct, firm 'No' to stop the guilt spiral and protect my study time.
goals.rationale: I'm assertive and hate wasting time on people-pleasing, but I also have low sleep discipline. I'll handle this conversation once I've locked in the work so I don't feel like I'm abandoning them while studying.

desires: Prove to Mina and Jae that I'm not just making excuses by getting my study session done tonight, even if it feels like a cop-out.
Get these last few hours of review under my belt so I can walk into that exam tomorrow feeling like I actually earned the grade instead of hoping for the best.
Shut down the nagging guilt about missing the club outing before it spirals into me feeling like a disappointment to my friend group.
